JUDGE WICK, DCOSTELO, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 10:58 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. LAWRENCE GRUNER FOR PLTF, DEFTS IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS. FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 1/14/95 12NOON. PLTF. WAIVES PAST DUE RENTS. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE PREMISES BY 1/14/95, PLTF. ENTITLED TO WRIT OF POSSESSION, MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $4,950 WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE BY EX-PARTE APPLICATION WITH THE COURT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, RAFAELITO JOHNSON, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 141 FARALLONES ST. $4,950.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,950.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF.
